# permissions

**Type Property**

The corresponding value represents the affected permissions in [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtensionContext] notifications.

## Declaration

```swift
nonisolated static let permissions: WKWebExtensionContext.NotificationUserInfoKey
```

## Type properties

- **matchPatterns**: The corresponding value represents the affected permission match patterns in [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtensionContext] notifications.
